LanguageData.FFF_EnvironmentalBill.label: special environment bill
LanguageData.FFF_EnvironmentalBill.helpText: Some recipes require a production building to be in a vacuum, clean, or microgravity environment to use these recipes.\n\nYou can view the special environment requirements of a recipe in the infocard.
LanguageData.FFF_MechTrade.label: automatroid trading
LanguageData.FFF_MechTrade.helpText: Automatroids brought from orbital trader will drop delivered to trade terminal. interaction from mechanitor with sufficient bandwidth is required to activate them. some of them can be disable for storage at any time, but all internal energy will be release during sealing proccess to prevent remote hacking activation.
